intents.text: Deploy subagent to verify if MLX LM supports batch and prompt caching for Qwen3-Next-80B model.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: mlx-lm lib doesnt allow us to run the model Qwen3-Next-80B

intents.text: Deploy 2 subagents: one to test batch vs cache speed, another to check if batching/caching can be added to MLX for a PR.
Draft the MLX PR with thorough performance testing, documentation, and actual model testing.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: draft the PR and thoroughly test its performance, with clear documentation

intents.text: Ask about creating the PR and what GitHub account is logged in.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Can you create the PR? Wait what's the current logged in Github account?

intents.text: Ask whether our PR is the same as existing mlx-lm PR #690.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Does our PR the same as https://github.com/ml-explore/mlx-lm/pull/690

intents.text: Add the _lengths feature to our PR.
